domain.title: Domain Name
domain.description: The company domain name whose reviews to scrape (e.g. 'apify.com', 'amazon.com', 'google.com').

maxPages.title: Maximum Pages
maxPages.description: Maximum number of pages of reviews to scrape (each page contains up to 20 reviews).

minRating.title: Minimum Rating
minRating.description: Filter reviews by a minimum star rating (1-5). Only reviews with this rating or higher will be extracted.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Specifies proxy servers that will be used by the scraper to bypass blocks. Using the default Apify proxy is recommended.
